jobs.title: Account Executive
jobs.content: <p>At Buildkite, our mission is to unblock every developer on the planet. We&rsquo;ve rethought how software delivery pipelines should work — your agents, your control, our orchestrator.</p><p>You&#39;ll own the full sales cycle for Buildkite Pipelines and Buildkite Test Engine across the US Mid-Market segment, partnering with our Solutions Architects to land and expand into engineering teams running CI on their own infrastructure.</p>

jobs.title: Staff Engineer - Compute & Agents
jobs.content: <p>Build the Buildkite Compute & Agents platform that thousands of engineering teams run their CI on — the agent-orchestration runtime, the autoscaling group integrator, and the spot-instance reclamation pipeline that the SRE team monitors every day. Buildkite&rsquo;s mission depends on this platform staying reliable across every cloud region.</p>
